name: Walnut Quick Bread (Ee)
recipeIngredient: Cream cheese or honey-cream for serving
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease an 8 by 4 by 2-inch loaf pan.
In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, walnuts, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon.
In another bowl, mix egg, milk, vanilla, and oil.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 1 to 1 1/4 hours, or until a tester inserted in the center is clean.
Cool completely on a rack before slicing.
Serve with softened cream cheese whisked together with honey.
